job_title: Sr. Data Engineer (Requiring Python, SQL, SSIS, SSRS, Power BI)
job_description:
# Sr. Data Engineer (Requiring Python, SQL, SSIS, SSRS, Power BI)
Company: CVS Health / Aetna Medicare Product Tools & Technology
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/3dd12e0e-97aa-48cf-bd71-509d2315278a

## Highlights
- Remote full-time role posted 1 day ago and updated recently on Dice.
- Aetna Medicare Product Tools & Technology role focused on data structures, ETL workflows, reporting needs, data marts/models, adherence to data quality/accessibility standards, Power BI, SSIS/SSRS, SQL, Python, Databricks, healthcare, and Medicare.
- Requires 5+ years of healthcare data analysis/systems experience, multiple engineering/data platform tools, and healthcare domain support.
strengths: Healthcare payer/Medicare, ETL, SQL, SSIS, Power BI, data quality, and reporting themes match parts of Swagatika's background.
Strong current board freshness from Dice.
gaps: This is primarily a senior data engineering role with Python, Hadoop/Hive, MicroStrategy, ML, Java, and infrastructure expectations not fully supported by the base resume.
Treat as stretch; do not rewrite resume into a software/data engineering profile.
notes: Skip/stretch unless the applicant wants a higher-risk Aetna technical role. Tailor only to ETL validation, SQL, Power BI, data quality, and healthcare domain support.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare ETL Analyst | SQL Data Quality | Reporting Validation

replacements.find: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines.
replacements.replace: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python while maintaining a foundation in SQL, ETL validation, reporting accuracy, and healthcare data quality.
